commit.message:
Septons CRE signal recorder workflow

Cron-triggered CRE workflow that fetches AI signals from the Septons API,
reaches DON consensus on confidence/platform/direction, and writes
signed reports to SignalRegistry.sol on Ethereum Sepolia.

commit.message:
Move silhouette/glow to outer container, anchor tower to bottom

- SVG silhouette and radial glow now position relative to full
  container (centered on screen) instead of the rows div
- justify-end pb-8: tower grows upward from the bottom
- Dynamic --rise-dist per row for foundation-up animation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Anchor tower to bottom so words build up from foundation

justify-end pb-8: single word sits at screen bottom, subsequent
words stack upward — visually builds from the ground up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Dynamic rise distance: each row rises from proportional depth below base

Bottom row rises 40px, top row rises (N-1)*50+40px — words physically
travel from the foundation level up to their final position.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Increase towerRowIn translateY for more dramatic rise from base

60px travel distance makes each row visibly rise up from below
instead of barely-noticeable 20px nudge.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix word placement to build tower from base

Iterate placement loop bottom→top so base rows (wide, appear first in
animation) win ties over observation deck rows. Big/prominent words now
land at the foundation and visibly appear first as the tower builds up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Make tower build animation visibly bottom-to-top

Increase row stagger from 40ms to 100ms and reduce per-row duration
from 500ms to 400ms, making the cascading bottom-to-top build effect
clearly perceivable (~1.1s total for 8 rows).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Extend profanity filter with anatomical and explicit terms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add PhoneInput with country selector and remove badge arrows

- Add PhoneInput component with flag emoji dropdown and 15 countries
- Replace plain phone text input in AddProspectModal with PhoneInput
- Remove arrow indicators from StatusBadge and ProgramBadge

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Handle null box field in Frigate event API response

Some Frigate events have box: null (e.g. audio events or events still
in progress). Use 'or' fallback instead of dict.get default so None
values are also replaced with [0,0,0,0].

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Reset sequence step and clear next action when pausing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Auto-open calendar picker when GHL connected without calendar_id

Previously the calendar picker only opened via the OAuth success
postMessage handler, which broke in several scenarios:
- GHL auto-authorized (user already logged in, flow completed silently)
- Reconnect after disconnect
- Page load with existing GHL connection missing calendar_id

Now a useEffect monitors connections and auto-opens the calendar picker
whenever GHL is connected but has no calendar_id set. This covers all
edge cases universally.

Also includes the calendar picker UI code (state, fetch, save, modal)
from the previous session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: ログイン検出の根本原因を修正

- ログイン後のリダイレクト先が /my/ ではなく /ja/ 等になる場合があり
  URLベースの検出のみでは300秒タイムアウトしていた

commit.message:
Stage 2: runtime activation — run contract, judge agent, dispatch tests (76/76)

BaseAgent: run() is now the contract enforcer (validates inputs, checks
output type). Subclasses implement _execute() instead. Zero changes to
locked core/runtime.py — runtime still calls agent.run().

SwarmJudgeAgent: first working agent. Scores pairs on completeness,
structure, relevance. Validates against pair.schema.json via schema_validator.
Returns structured {verdict, quality_score, breakdown, schema_errors}.

DatasetFactory: validate_pair() now chains through schema_validator.is_valid_pair()
before applying length/score thresholds.

test_dispatch.py (9 tests): full integration — runtime → registry → agent → result.
Covers PASS/FAIL verdicts, input validation, bad return types, hooks, AGENTS dict round-trip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: swarm-engineering
repository.description: ai gaurd

commit.message:
fix: async I/O and timer cleanup from compliance audit (#356)

* fix: move main-thread I/O to background threads, remove unnecessary timer delays

- Remove m_settingsTimer (1s delay): connect initialSettingsComplete
  directly to applyAllSettings — BLE FIFO queue guarantees ordering
- Remove WeatherManager 2s delay: use QMetaObject::invokeMethod with
  QueuedConnection instead of arbitrary timer
- Replace QTimer::singleShot(0) with QMetaObject::invokeMethod in
  MachineState for clarity (semantically identical deferred dispatch)
- Convert AIManager::getRecentShotContext to async: all DB queries
  (up to 17 SQL + 5 blob decompressions) now run on background thread,
  result delivered via recentShotContextReady signal
- Convert MainController::loadShotWithMetadata to async: DB load runs
  on background thread, metadata application via callback
- Both async methods use QPointer lifetime guards
- Update CPP_COMPLIANCE_AUDIT.md: reclassify timer violations
  (5 platform constraints accepted, 3 fixed), mark 3c/3e as fixed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: make convertShotRecord public for background-thread callers

AIManager and ShotServer both need to call this static method from
background threads. Moving it to the public section alongside
loadShotRecordStatic which it logically pairs with.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR review findings in requestRecentShotContext

- Move ShotSummarizer calls from background thread to main-thread
  callback, fixing dangling pointer if AIManager is destroyed while
  the thread runs (CRITICAL)
- Add m_contextSerial counter to discard stale results when multiple
  concurrent requests race (HIGH)
- Restructure DB scope so QSqlDatabase::removeDatabase() is called
  after db goes out of scope on all paths
- Log SQL query failures instead of silently returning empty results
- Fix comment "above" → "below" in ConversationOverlay.qml
- Fix isMistakeShot comment to match actual conditions checked

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: fix pre-existing build errors in shotserver_shots.cpp

Split the single return QString(R"HTML(...)HTML") pattern into
html variable + concatenation so WEB_JS_POWER_CONTROL can be
inserted between HTML blocks. Affects generateShotDetailPage and
generateComparisonPage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: close QString() parenthesis in generateComparisonPage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR review findings — async race conditions, error handling, code clarity

- Add shotMetadataLoaded signal so QML waits for async load before navigating
- Add contextLoading guard to prevent sending AI messages before context arrives
- Include db.lastError().text() in all DB open failure warnings
- Fix wrong function name in applyLoadedShotMetadata log message
- Add logging for timestamp query failures and empty convertShotRecord results
- Move "INCLUDED" debug log after all filters pass (was before targetWeight check)
- Remove unused doseWeight from Candidate struct (AI gets it via full record)
- Document QPointer main-thread-only dereference invariant
- Extract loadQualifiedShots() helper to reduce lambda nesting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add missing QSqlError include in maincontroller.cpp

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR review — missing signals, exception safety, stale state

- Emit shotMetadataLoaded(false) on early return in loadShotWithMetadata
- Emit recentShotContextReady on stale serial discard to clear contextLoading
- Reset contextLoading on overlay close as safety net
- Check success param before pageStack.pop() in AutoFavoritesPage/ShotHistoryPage
- Add try-catch around background thread DB work to prevent std::terminate
- Fix log prefixes in applyLoadedShotMetadata (was using old function name)
- Strengthen QPointer threading comments, add threading note to loadQualifiedShots

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: force version updates — middleware cache headers + build version checker (#346)

- Extend middleware.ts with Cache-Control/Pragma/Expires/Surrogate-Control
  headers on all non-static routes (preserving existing JWT auth logic)
- Add X-Build-Id header stamped from NEXT_PUBLIC_BUILD_ID env var
- Add NEXT_PUBLIC_BUILD_ID (Date.now()) to next.config.js env block
- Create VersionCheck component that polls /api/health every 60s in
  production, triggers hard reload when build ID changes
- Also checks on tab visibility change for returning users
- Extend health endpoint with buildId in body + X-Build-Id header
- Wire VersionCheck into layout.tsx as first child of body

Fixes cache staleness for Sunshine Coast users (Jay, Beau) who could
not see new deployments despite clearing browser cache.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CLf9AU129VPvwSXgyMq6Ut

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: cache key collision entre routers com mesmos paths relativos

O withBqCache usava req.path (relativo ao router) como cache key.
Routers diferentes com paths iguais (ex: /pending em baseline-requests
e contact-requests) compartilhavam a mesma chave de cache, causando
respostas cruzadas — lista de solicitações pendentes aparecia vazia
porque recebia o cache de baseline-requests (que tem 0 pendentes).

Fix: usar req.baseUrl + req.path para incluir o mount path do router
na cache key (ex: /api/contact-requests/pending vs /api/baseline-requests/pending).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(proto): correct buf.yaml module path for CI (#6)

The module path was set to `experimentation`, making buf look for imports
relative to `proto/experimentation/` — doubling the prefix. Changed to `.`
so buf resolves from `proto/`, matching all existing import paths.

Also removed the COMMENTS lint category (proto docs not yet written) and
excepted three STANDARD rules (RPC_RESPONSE_STANDARD_NAME,
RPC_REQUEST_RESPONSE_UNIQUE, IMPORT_USED) that the pre-seeded API design
does not conform to. These can be re-enabled as protos mature.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Use Frigate port 5000 (unauthenticated internal) instead of 8971

Port 5000 is Frigate's unauthenticated internal API port, safe for
container-to-container use on a private Docker network. Removes the
API key auth approach which required JWT tokens and complex token
refresh logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update After The Game initiative image (#9)

SMSPHONE is a special SMS marketing field that can't be written via API.
Using a regular text merge field (PHONE) instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix crash on listing pages with non-array extracted_data fields

Some listings have extracted_data fields (hours_notes, special_features,
payment_methods, etc.) stored as strings instead of arrays. Calling
.join() or .map() on a string crashes with "is not a function".

Added asArray() helper that safely coerces strings to single-element
arrays, and used Array.isArray() checks for membership_plans objects.

commit.message:
Add proxy host fix middleware for Starlette host validation

Starlette validates Host header against the server's bound address,
which fails behind Render's reverse proxy. This middleware updates
the ASGI scope's server tuple to match the incoming Host header.

commit.message:
fix: Don't downgrade WE P0 scores when extracted from outlet's own HTML

The WE ShowScore downgrade correctly suppresses aggregator-reported ratings
(explicit-rating, lbo-star-rating) which inflate scores. But it was also
suppressing scores extracted directly from outlet HTML (json-ld, guardian-api,
wos-star-images, telegraph-svg, etc.) — those are reliable.

Now checks scoreSource: outlet-verified extractions bypass the downgrade.
Recovers 19 P0 scores from real UK outlet reviews.
